_README: Typed connection ports for this organ (the Lego studs). See the connection standard: orchestrator/CONNECTORS.md. `name` is the literal key decide() reads under `state` (inputs) / writes under `output` (outputs); `type` names a connection type in the shared vocabulary (types.json) — two ports connect iff their `type` matches.

_checked._README: Corpus + OSS freshness manifest read by scripts/corpus_oss_sweep.py (discovery-engine). `corpus_checked` = last verification this organ still mirrors its discovery-engine source module; `oss_checked` = last comparison against the open-source market. Stale dates re-enqueue an audit. See discovery-engine/docs/architecture/corpus-oss-sweep.md.

_non_ports._README: Keys decide() reads/writes that are NOT typed connection studs — scalar control fields and submitter identity that travel alongside a port payload but do not couple to another organ. Documented (not minted as new types) to keep the vocabulary from sprawling. See CONNECTORS.md, 'Standard before scale'.
